name: Chicken Marsala..vvkx95a
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Marsala wine -- sherry or cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the chicken in flour, sprinkling with salt, pepper, and tarragon.
2. Brown in hot oil/butter. Remove from heat.
3. Deglaze the skillet with wine. Add broth, stirring.
4. Add cream with mustard, stirring until thickened.
5. Return chicken to the pan.
6. Serve over rice, garnished with parsley.
